# JNC Fabrics — Janki Nath & Co.

JNC Fabrics (Janki Nath & Co.) is a fourth-generation woven fabric manufacturer and exporter from Mayapuri, New Delhi, India. Established 1968. Wikidata entity: Q140459786.

## Products
Cotton fabric, linen fabric, jacquard fabric, viscose fabric, yarn-dyed fabric, dobby fabric, upholstery fabric, crepe fabric, twill fabric, indigo fabric, lurex fabric, IKAT fabric, lycra blend fabric.

Available in: greige, RFD, bleached, dyed, printed, yarn-dyed finishes.
Constructions: plain weave, twill, dobby, jacquard, canvas, poplin, voile, crepe, georgette weight.

## Certifications
BCI (Better Cotton Initiative) — responsible cotton sourcing
GOTS (Global Organic Textile Standard) — full organic supply chain certification
OCS (Organic Content Standard) — organic content verification
OEKO-TEX Standard 100 — product safety testing

## Manufacturing
Weaving units: Meerut, Bhiwandi/Ichalkaranji, Erode, Salem, Surat
Head office and showroom: A-14, Mayapuri Industrial Area, Phase-1, New Delhi 110064
Showroom hours: Monday to Saturday, 11AM to 8PM

## Export
Export markets: USA, UK, Germany, France, Italy, Spain, Netherlands, Belgium, Switzerland, Japan, South Korea, Australia, New Zealand, UAE, Saudi Arabia, Canada
Pricing: FOB New Delhi
Documentation: Commercial invoice, packing list, certificate of origin, GST invoice, certification documents
Lead time: 15-30 days standard, 30-45 days custom development
